APPEARANCES - ATTY. LOREN E. SCHWARTZ OF EMISON, HULLVERSON & MITCHELL LLP, TEL. NO. 434-2111
APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. VICTORIA L. TALLMAN OF LYNCH, GILARDI & GRUMMER, TEL. NO. 397-2800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JENTA SHEN'S MOTION TO STRIKE LANGUAGE IN PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Denied. The allegations sought to be stricken are not irrelevant, false or improper. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/HK

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LOREN E. SCHWARTZ OF EMISON, HULLVERSON & MITCHELL LLP, TEL. NO. 434-2111
APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. VICTORIA L. TALLMAN OF LYNCH, GILARDI & GRUMMER, TEL. NO. 397-2800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JENTA SHEN'S DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION OF THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. Ms. McFadden has adequately pled a claim of medical battery for exceeding conditional consent. That claim is not uncertain. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
